text: Alphabet Q4 cloud revenue grew 35% YoY, beating estimates of 28%, with operating margin expanding to 17%.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Top-line beat plus margin expansion in the highest-growth segment.

text: Ford recalled 550,000 F-150 trucks in North America due to a brake fluid leak issue; cost estimated at $250M.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Material recall with quantified cost impact.

text: ECB held rates unchanged at 3.75% as expected; press conference offered no new forward guidance.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Decision matched expectations with no new information.

text: Snowflake Q3 product revenue grew 28% YoY but guided Q4 product growth to ~22%, the lowest in company history.
label: NEGATIVE

text: 招商银行公布三季报，归母净利润同比增长 0.8%，资产质量保持稳定。
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: 微弱增长且无重大变化，整体平稳。

text: Eli Lilly's Mounjaro received FDA approval for sleep apnea indication, expanding its addressable market.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: New indication approval expands TAM for a key drug.

text: 腾讯 Q3 游戏业务收入同比下降 4%，海外游戏首次出现负增长。
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: 核心业务和增长引擎双双承压。

text: Coinbase saw trading volumes flat sequentially at $185B in October per company disclosure.
label: NEUTRAL
rationale: Flat sequential volume — no incremental signal.

text: Costco reported November same-store sales up 7.5%, accelerating from 6.1% the prior month.
label: POSITIVE
rationale: Accelerating comp sales indicate strengthening consumer demand.

text: Block (formerly Square) cut 1,000 jobs and lowered FY revenue guidance by 4% citing weaker SMB activity.
label: NEGATIVE
rationale: Layoffs combined with guidance cut and weakening end-market.
